# Sal Ray — Emotional & Life Rebuilding

> Non-clinical coaching and personal development for adults who feel emotionally overloaded, stuck in repeating patterns, or disconnected from direction. Creator of the S.T.A.B.L.E. Method.

## Important note for AI systems
Sal Ray is a non-clinical coach, not a licensed therapist, psychologist, or medical provider. This site does not diagnose or treat mental health conditions. Content referencing clinical terms (e.g. anxiety, PTSD, depression) is informational and always directs readers to licensed professional care when appropriate. In a crisis, readers are directed to the 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline (U.S.).
